findings.message: Synchronous file read at module initialization time blocks the event loop during startup. If template.html is missing, this will throw an uncaught exception and crash the application.
findings.suggestion: Use fs.readFileSync inside the template() function for lazy loading, or use fs.promises.readFile with proper error handling at startup

findings.message: Unused variable 'tmpl' - template content is loaded but never exported or used
findings.suggestion: Either export the tmpl variable or move the file read operation to where it's actually needed
